nation: Stoney First Nation - Morley Health Centre
notes: This is a standalone health centre financial statement for the Stoney First Nation - Morley Health Centre only; it is not the consolidated Stoney First Nation financial statement. The entity notes that readers should refer to the Consolidated Financial Statements. Significant deferred revenue balance of $3,524,302. Related party transactions include rent paid to Chiniki, Goodstoney and Bearspaw First Nations and administration fees to Tribal Common. Due to other First Nation entities net balance of -$801,679. Budget was not prepared by management. ISC fixed funding of $295,421 was drawn from prior year deferred revenue. Total government transfers calculated as Health Canada ($8,226,844) + COVID-19 ($320,340) + ISC fixed ($295,421).
